siteFooter.tagline: A seeded voxel world protocol on Solana.

hero.title: Guardian Network Console
hero.body: Register a non-custodial Guardian to keep a region reachable, synchronize realtime chunk activity, and support local game services. Stable Guardians can earn NCK from future regional resource taxes and trading taxes while never holding player assets or signing for users.

register.title: Register Node
register.body: Publish a connection endpoint for a 100 x 100 chunk service region. Offline or unstable nodes can be penalized; stable nodes can receive Guardian rewards from the treasury over time, paid back to the registration wallet.

status.noWallet: No Solana wallet was detected. Install Phantom or Solflare.
status.confirmWallet: Confirm the registration transaction in your wallet.
status.updateConfirm: Confirm the endpoint update in your wallet.

list.title: Active Guardians
list.body: Live devnet Guardian regions. Connect a wallet to prioritize and mark your own Guardians.
list.registryMissing: Guardian registry has not been initialized yet.
list.connectFirst: Connect a wallet to load the Guardian registry.
list.empty: No active guardians are registered yet.

access.title: Access Layer
access.body: Guardians keep regional endpoints reachable so clients can discover and communicate with nearby chunk services.

realtime.title: Realtime Transport
realtime.body: They support live coordination for region activity without replacing wallet signatures or on-chain settlement.

nonCustodial.title: Non-Custodial Flow
nonCustodial.body: Guardians never custody player assets, sign for users, or process Solana transactions on a player's behalf.

error.insufficientSol: The connected wallet needs a small amount of devnet SOL for transaction fees.
error.insufficientNck: The connected wallet does not have enough devnet NCK for the 100,000 NCK registration payment.
error.noPriorCredit: The wallet has no devnet SOL record yet. Request devnet SOL before registering.
error.invalidTokenAccount: The NCK token account is invalid. Confirm that the wallet holds devnet NCK.
error.regionAlreadyActive: This region already has an active Guardian.
error.invalidConnection: Invalid connection endpoint. Use ws://host:port or wss://host:port without a path.
error.invalidHost: Invalid host. Use only a domain, IP address, or hostname without http:// or wss://.
error.missingAdjacentGuardian: A non-genesis Guardian must be adjacent to at least one active Guardian.
error.invalidAdjacentGuardian: Adjacent region PDA is invalid. Refresh and try again.
error.noGenesisPermission: Genesis Guardian registration must be signed by the development wallet. Switch wallets or disable genesis registration.
error.genesisAlreadyRegistered: The Genesis Guardian has already been registered.
